question.label: Concept rationale
question.name: Concept rationale — what makes that harder for you right now?
question.description: Drills into the specific growth gap he named to surface the underlying cause.

answer: A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — tighter, single-skill feedback loops — which signals blocked growth and some lack of clarity on how to improve.

new_queue.label: Improvement loop
new_queue.name: What would a tighter one-skill feedback loop look like in practice?

new_queue.label: Practice commitment
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 7)

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.

When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I would like to grow faster in concept rationale, not just execution speed.
A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.
